headline: Why American Electric Power (AEP) Is Up 5.1% After $2.6 Billion Follow-On Equity Offering – And What's Next
summary: Earlier in May 2026, American Electric Power Company completed a US$2.60 billion follow-on equity offering of 20,472,442 common shares at US$127 each, reflecting a per-share discount of US$2.03. This sizeable capital raise strengthens AEP’s funding capacity for grid investments and potential nuclear and transmission projects that are reshaping its business mix. Next, we’ll examine how this large equity raise, and the grid and nuclear projects it supports, affect AEP’s existing investment...
